about_ivs_desc: Learn about our mission, vision, and core values.
about_us_content: At IVS, we believe in the power of education to shape the future. Our mission is to provide advanced educational and technological solutions, helping students develop comprehensively and be ready for the challenges of the 21st century.
about_us_intro: IVS JSC, or Integrate Vision Synergy Trading Services Joint Stock Company, was established with the mission of bringing comprehensive, high-quality educational and technological solutions to Vietnam. We are proud to be a reliable partner for many educational organizations, businesses, and individuals.
about_us_sub: Established with the mission of creating positive change through education and technology, IVS continuously strives to provide high-quality training and consulting solutions.

ceo_section_title: Message & Capability Profile from IVS JSC
ceo_quote: We commit to dedicated contribution, tirelessly striving for the remarkable development of Vietnamese Education. Our strategic vision is to thoroughly optimize national resources, save costs for the country, and effectively transform investments that have not reached maximum efficiency. With a strong spirit of SYNERGY, we will enhance deep international cooperation, focusing on comprehensive support for domestic educational institutions, to build a solid, modern, and integrated education system.

We are committed to delivering exceptional educational value and proudly participate as a core member of IIVSA – The International Education Alliance, strengthening our position and capacity for international collaboration.

about_philosophy_integrate_desc: We believe in the power of connection. 'Integrate' reflects IVS's commitment to harmoniously combine key elements: advanced technology, internationally-aligned curricula, and real-world needs — creating a cohesive ecosystem where all parts complement each other and drive measurable impact.
about_philosophy_ivs: The Integrate - Vision - Synergy philosophy guides all IVS activities and shapes our commitment to building a sustainable, comprehensive future for education.
about_philosophy_synergy_desc: True strength comes from collaboration. 'Synergy' emphasizes building a strong network of strategic partners, top experts, and the wider education community — together amplifying impact and achieving greater, sustainable outcomes.

exp_bioutah_summary: Founded and led Utah's life sciences association, representing medical device, biologics, and related companies. The association attracted over 80 supporting organizations in the first year, maximizing Utah's position as a magnet for capital, talent, and transformative companies.
exp_synaptic_dates: Not specified (overall career context over 25 years) - Salt Lake City, UT
exp_synaptic_summary: Management and public relations consulting firm, focused on connections and integrated strategies. The name 'Synaptic' suggests focus on connections, communication, and integrated strategies.
exp_nextphase_dates: Around 2007 (time of book 'Utah, Life Elevated') - Salt Lake City, UT
exp_nextphase_summary: Full-service public relations and marketing company, supporting clients from startups to the World Bank. Provides expertise in communications, marketing, and business development strategies.
exp_editorial_summary: Extensive editorial and publishing experience, contributing to Utah's business and technology publications, including Digital iQ magazine (Co-founder, Publisher & Editor-in-Chief), Business Utah (Editor), and Utah Business magazine (Contributing Editor).
kimball_bioutah_overview_intro: Mr. Kimball Thomson served as President & CEO of BioUtah, succeeding founder Rich Linder, primarily in 2013. His role occurred in a critical transition period, right after the organization's first year, to consolidate and shape core programs.
role_vision_focus_detail: Thomson focused on expanding BioUtah's vision and developing strategic partnerships in the scientific community to create growth for Utah's life sciences industry.
role_vision_commitment_detail: He demonstrated BioUtah's commitment to maximizing Utah's position as a place attracting capital, human resources, and companies capable of making a big change in the world.
role_vision_representation_detail: Under his leadership, BioUtah represented diverse fields such as medical devices, biologics, clinical laboratories, diagnostics, and health care companies.
key_contribution_intro: Kimball Thomson's most notable contribution was organizing and chairing the 2013 Utah Life Science Summit.
key_contribution_event: Key event: This was a pivotal event to connect and promote the life sciences community in the state right after its founding.
key_contribution_consolidation: Organization consolidation: His efforts helped consolidate BioUtah after the founding phase, laying a solid foundation for networks and events for subsequent development.
leadership_transition_context: Mr. Thomson left the position after a relatively short period, but this is considered normal for newly established organizations that need leadership changes to suit different development stages. The transition may have been part of the initial strategic plan, where he played a role in laying the foundation before handing over to someone with longer-term management experience.
leadership_successor_slone: Kelly Slone (appointed in 2015): Tasked with expanding BioUtah's vision.
leadership_successor_cullimore: Kelvyn H. Cullimore Jr. (appointed in 2018): Continued long-term leadership and developed the organization to become stronger.
leadership_transition_conclusion: Kimball Thomson successfully created the necessary stepping stone, transitioning BioUtah from its initial founding year to a phase focused on events and network expansion, before later leaders brought the organization into the policy advocacy and economic scale growth phase.

interior_page_title: IVS Celestech - Professional Interior Design & Construction
interior_process_step1_desc: We listen to the school's needs, desires, and budget to provide initial advice on style, materials, and optimal solutions for the educational space.
interior_process_step2_desc: The IVS Celestech team will conduct on-site surveys, collect data, and begin drafting preliminary design ideas, focusing on pedagogy and safety.
interior_process_step2_title: Survey Current Status & Develop Design Ideas
interior_process_step3_desc: After agreeing on the idea, we will sign the design contract and IVS Celestech will deploy detailed design documents (2D, 3D), including equipment locations.
interior_process_step4_desc: The client approves the final design drawings. We will prepare detailed construction quotes based on the approved design documents, including equipment costs.
interior_process_step5_desc: Proceed with construction and installation of interiors according to approved drawings, simultaneously supplying and installing modern educational equipment, ensuring quality and progress.
interior_process_step7_desc: The client accepts the entire project and equipment. IVS Celestech hands over the completed educational space as per design and commitments.
interior_process_title: Process of Designing & Constructing Educational Projects
psb_hero_subtitle: IVS provides comprehensive legal solutions to help businesses comply with regulations, optimize operations, and achieve sustainable development.
psb_introduction_content_1: PSB (Professional Solutions for Business) is an important part of IVS's service ecosystem, focusing on providing legal solutions and in-depth consulting for businesses. We understand that the business environment is increasingly complex, requiring strict compliance with legal regulations.
psb_introduction_content_2: With a team of experienced experts in corporate law, IVS is committed to providing accurate, timely, and effective advice to help your business operate smoothly and develop sustainably.
psb_service_registration_desc: Support the entire process from document preparation to completion of legal procedures.
psb_service_compliance_desc: Ensure businesses operate in accordance with regulations, avoiding legal risks.
psb_service_contracts_desc: Support building solid legal agreements to protect your interests.
psb_service_tax_desc: Ensure optimization of tax obligations and effective financial management.
psb_service_ip_desc: Protect business intellectual property through registration and legal consulting.
psb_service_restructuring_desc: Support complex transactions such as mergers, acquisitions, and business restructuring.
psb_cta_subtitle: IVS's expert team is ready to listen and provide optimal solutions for all legal issues of your business.

careervn_join_us_desc: We are always looking for passionate, creative, and ambitious talents. At IVS, you will have the opportunity to work in a professional environment, receive skill development support, and contribute to the global education mission.

job_desc_head_academy_admission: Build admission plans, manage consulting team and achieve admission targets for IVS Academy.
job_desc_head_edu_academic: Develop and monitor quality of regular education programs, ensure compliance with international standards.
job_desc_head_edu_student_mgt: Manage and support students throughout their learning process, ensure positive and safe school environment.
job_desc_head_consulting_edu: Provide in-depth education consulting solutions for organizations, schools, and individuals.
job_desc_head_consulting_tech: Consult and implement EdTech solutions for customers.
job_desc_head_celestech_product: Research, design and develop new educational technology products of IVS Celestech.
job_desc_head_celestech_tech: Manage technical team, ensure effective implementation and operation of technology solutions.
job_desc_sales_exec: Develop markets, search for and care for customers, partners in assigned areas. Achieve sales targets.
job_desc_community_admin: Manage, develop and interact with community on social media platforms. Build content, organize minigames, online events. Love interaction, community management experience is an advantage.
job_desc_teacher_multi: Teach foreign languages according to international standard programs. Requirements: Appropriate teaching certificates, experience, passion and enthusiasm.
job_desc_content_creator: Create multi-platform content (website, blog, social media), attractive, suitable for IVS's educational orientation and brand.
job_desc_kol: Collaborate to promote IVS JSC's image, programs in education, technology, health fields. Influence required.
job_desc_mc: Professionally host bilingual programs, events, seminars of IVS JSC in a professional, fluent, and attractive way.
job_desc_video_prod: Implement video projects (filming, editing, post-production) for communication, marketing, teaching materials of IVSMedia.
job_listing_note: (These are some representative positions. Please contact HR department or visit IVS Academy Recruitment Fanpage for the most updated and complete information)
talent_dev_title: Outstanding Talent Development Opportunities at IVS
talent_dev_desc: IVS continuously seeks and nurtures talents. We are committed to providing a continuous learning environment, trained and led by top experts. With a clear development roadmap, you have the opportunity to become a core part, accompany IVS's growth and create sustainable values for the future.
consultation_form_subtitle_career_vn: Please fill in the information in the form below, IVS JSC HR department will contact you as soon as possible.
consultation_alt_contact_prefix: Or contact HR department directly via:
submit_application_description: Please fill in the information below to become part of IVS's international teaching team.
email_error: Please enter a valid email address.
qualification_placeholder: Example: Master of Education, Bachelor of English
experience_error: Please enter valid years of experience.
subjects_error: Please enter subjects you can teach.
bio_placeholder: Highlight your experience and teaching style (max 200 words)
document_upload_instruction: To send CV, profile photo or other documents (video, PDF), please prepare these files on cloud storage services (e.g., Google Drive, Dropbox) and provide public or appropriately accessible links in the fields below.
resume_url_placeholder: URL to your CV or profile
tech_devices_page_title: Technology Equipment & Infrastructure Solutions - IVS JSC
tech_devices_meta_description: Discover high-quality technology solutions and office equipment from IVS JSC. Providing comprehensive solutions for businesses and organizations.
tech_devices_og_title: Technology Equipment & Office Solutions - IVS JSC
tech_devices_og_description: Comprehensive technology solutions, high-quality office equipment and professional services from IVS JSC.
tech_devices_hero_subtitle: IVS JSC provides advanced technology solutions and high-quality equipment, meeting all needs of businesses and educational organizations.
tech_devices_category_1_description: We provide a variety of modern technology equipment, from computers, network devices to specialized software solutions.
tech_devices_category_2_description: Build and optimize a solid IT infrastructure system for your business.
tech_devices_commitment_1_description: Always seeking and applying the latest technologies.
tech_devices_commitment_2_description: Ensure products and services meet the highest standards.
tech_devices_process_step_1_description: Our expert team will listen and thoroughly analyze your specific requirements.
tech_devices_process_step_2_description: Build architecture and select the most suitable equipment and software for your budget and goals.
tech_devices_process_step_3_description: Perform installation, configuration and system integration professionally.
tech_devices_process_step_4_description: Ensure the system operates stably before handover and provide detailed usage instructions.
tech_devices_process_step_5_description: Provide technical support services and regular maintenance to ensure optimal performance.
tech_devices_benefits_title: Benefits of Partnering with IVS JSC
tech_devices_benefit_1_description: Effective solutions that help save long-term budget.
tech_devices_benefit_4_description: Experienced engineering team, ensuring projects are implemented on time and with the highest quality.
tech_devices_cta_description: Contact us today to get advice on the most suitable solution for your business
page_internationalcoop_title: IVS Global Partnerships: Forging the Future of Education
meta_internationalcoop_description: IVS Global Partnerships: Forging the Future of Education. Explore our collaborations with international partners like The Power to Inspire, IU English Academ...
meta_internationalcoop_keywords: IVS, education, international, partnership, global, STEAM, English, scholarships, Kinderlink25, The Power to Inspire, IU English Academy, du học
og_internationalcoop_title: IVS Global Partnerships: Shaping the Future of Education
og_internationalcoop_description: IVS Global Partnerships: Forging the Future of Education. Explore our collaborations with international partners like The Power to Inspire, IU English Academy, and global universities for scholarships and educational programs.
twitter_internationalcoop_description: IVS Global Partnerships: Forging the Future of Education. Explore our collaborations with international partners.
hero_internationalcoop_title: IVS Global Partnerships: Shaping the Future of Education
hero_internationalcoop_description: IVS is a pioneering organization in the education sector in Vietnam, always seeking and developing sustainable international partnerships to improve education quality and bring value to the community.
why_partner_internationalcoop_vision_des: IVS possesses long-term oriented thinking, constantly innovating and always proposing specific, feasible, and leading solutions.
why_partner_internationalcoop_expertise_: IVS's team of experts has practical experience, deeply understands the Vietnamese education market and international trends.
why_partner_internationalcoop_values_des: Quality - Dedication - Creativity - Equality. IVS is committed to providing practical and valuable programs and solutions.
why_partner_internationalcoop_ecosystem_: IVS Academy (language & skills training) and IVS Education (STEAM program development and digital learning solutions) expand partnership opportunities.
why_partner_internationalcoop_global_lin: As a key member of IIVSA - Global Education Alliance, IVS affirms its position and prestige on the international stage.
partner_internationalcoop_power_to_inspi: Strategic partner from the United States, together with IVS developing advanced educational programs, inspiring the younger generation.
project_internationalcoop_kinderlink25_d: Collaborating to develop international standard preschool programs, providing comprehensive learning environments for Vietnamese children.
partner_internationalcoop_iu_english_aca: International Summer Camp: IU ENGLISH ACADEMY (Philippines)
Partner organizing intensive English summer camp programs in the Philippines, helping students improve their proficiency and experience diverse cultures.
partner_internationalcoop_universities_d: IVS collaborates with many reputable universities worldwide, providing valuable study abroad scholarship programs and comprehensive development opportunities for students.
partner_internationalcoop_cross_industry: IVS expands cooperation with multi-industry businesses, supporting the development of high-quality human resources and projects with positive social impact.
collab_internationalcoop_program_dev_des: STEAM, foreign languages, life skills, preschool/elementary/secondary programs according to international standards.
collab_internationalcoop_edtech_transfer: Modern and effective digital learning solutions, E-learning platforms.
collab_internationalcoop_training_dev_de: Teacher training, education management according to international standards.
collab_internationalcoop_research_dev_de: Joint research projects on global education trends, innovation in teaching methods.
collab_internationalcoop_student_teacher: Cultural, academic exchange programs, enhancing international experience.
process_internationalcoop_step1_desc: Send partnership request via form or email.
process_internationalcoop_step2_desc: Discuss in detail the needs and objectives of the partnership.
process_internationalcoop_step3_desc: IVS builds plans and proposes suitable solutions.
process_internationalcoop_step4_desc: Implement the project and evaluate effectiveness periodically.
cta_internationalcoop_title: Start your partnership journey with IVS!
cta_internationalcoop_description: We are always ready to discuss potential partnership opportunities to jointly create value and elevate education.
